content:
And who's to say that future characters aren't designed in the way that only their full kit becomes avaliable at +12? We know all current ones and their kit but we don't know the balance of new unreleased ones where their full kit was never seen without this AA stuff. You can't twist this in any good light and say, "AA is a good thing for limited, healthy for the game". Who, except BIG Spenders, is actually happy when a new mechanic for a character requires you to spend almost 650-700 (!) wishes on ONE awakaner on AVERAGE?

And while we are at it, why not give a bonus mechanics to WoD's +12 for 3rd Anni? Why stop at awakaners? If you open one door, don't be surprised if another opens too

didnt light previously mentioned that we won’t be following jp game changes ? 

and yet we followed and received the limited awakeners stat buff, and now the +12 welfare unit buff

i’m not surprised if the next would be buffs for +12 limited awakeners & wheel of destiny, seeing as +20 was once previously considered 💀

tbh if that does happen, i’ll stop supporting this game, as it is e3 / OE being the “norm” or requirement for end game hard mode / dtide is quite predatory enough
the +12 is from the jp side?
